title: Level 381
wikitext:
{{DISPLAYTITLE:Hills of No Return}}
{{Notice|body=Contains description of blood/flesh and violent imagery, 13+}}

Glory to those who walk alone
In search of their desires in an ephemeral life
Live your life, wanderer


Those were the text I hallucinated back in that [[Level 99|weird glitchy land]] right before the scenery slowly faded into what I thought were beautifully grassy hills. I smelled the sweet, sweet petrichor off the grass, and picked one of the blooming dandelions. Honestly, it reminded me how nice life was and how granted I had taken it for before all this mess. I continued marching down along the road, hoping to explore more about this magnificent place. Walking in this hellhole finally feels like more of an option rather than a survival neccesity. Not so far off, I even spotted a empty house! Maybe then I could reside here, peacefully and hopefully forever. After a while, I finally arrive at the house, and entered. The space wasn't big, but it could do for now. I hastily leave my stuff inside and go outside to the terrain to appreciate and admire the scenery. However, a while pass, I soon feel pain and discomfort, and immediately rush to my makeshift home. Upon my entrance, I quickly discover that my resources and my beloved bag is gone. This must be some sick joke, right? The ache intensifies, and I manage to retrieve an [[Almond Water]] bottle, and chug it like it's my miracle. I scream for help. I cry. No one comes. Every minute feels like a day now. The Almond Water did nothing; most of my flesh rots and starts to fall off as crimson blood spill on the ground like red wine running through a faucet. Hurt. Hurt. Hurt. That's all I can think of. I eventually start smelling like disposal waste, and I look like a rotten zombie. The pain is unimaginable, and I cannot bear it anymore. I lay down on the grass, hoping that this was all an illusion.

...




Rest, traveler.
{{Image Banner|caption=Your breathing slows, just as your decayed body starts to amalgamate into the hills...|image=BeautifulMRange.PNG}} {{Class 3|color-h=140|class=Phi|safety=Unsafe|security=Stable|entity=Lethal Hazards|hexagon=φ|color-s=100%|color-l=62%}} ==
Description
== {{Blurimage|file=BeautifulMRange.PNG|caption=A photo of '''Level 381'''.}} '''Level 381''', titled by wanderers as "'''Hills of No Return'''", is located in a endless deserted, verdant plains with expansive hills with a constant blue sky. The hills are covered in a blanket of grass, although it is unknown what is beneath the grass, as the grass cannot be removed, and the grass gives off a petrichor scent. They also occasionally merge into each other, forming peculiar hill shapes. The temperature maintains a stable 26°C, and does not appear to fluctuate. Weather in this level stays very consistently; it appears to never rain and rarely bears clouds. The sky lacks any celestial objects including the sun, and also do not have a day-and-night cycle. The fields are often barren, with little to no plant life found in most areas. Water and food sources barely exist, so it is advised to enter with food sources or avoid entering. Food also regularly decays much faster in this level compared to other levels. Foreign objects that come from other levels will slowly sink and merge into the ground; this may contribute to the desolateness of '''Level 381'''. Due to this, do not put one's items on the floor. Asphalt roads act as the main pathways in this level; the roads often lead to nowhere or dead ends, and may even end abruptly. Houses can occasionally appear at the end of roads. Houses often appear as a bungalow, or a two-story suburban house; its architectural style is relatively inspired by American ranches. Despite the exterior appearing to be well-maintained for, the interior of the houses are commonly empty, or at best half-renovated. If the house contains furniture, then it usually consists of couches, tables, or chairs; these furnitures are always placed without organization. Furthermore, the houses do not contain a single light source at all; it is ill-advised to not bring a flashlight or lamp with one. The buildings are typically weak in strength, punching the walls or anywhere else may result in moderate damage and cracking to the place. Wanderers are normally fascinated by the beauty of '''Level 381''' while in the level, luring them to stay in the level even more. One should not be fooled by its looks, as staying inside this level will only put more harm to the wanderer, more on the matter below. Travellers typically report a sense of tranquility and peace, and wanting to stay in the level forever during their stay; such sensations are heavily suspected to come from an anomaly, although further research prove to be futile. Although it is confirmed that no entities roam throughout '''Level 381''', recent reports state that animal-like footprints can be seen either can be seen on the grass or on the roads; faint footsteps can be even heard in the distance, but this cannot be possible due to a [[Phenomenon 15|certain phenomenon]] present inside the level. This has caused some paranoia and fear within wanderers. It is unknown where these hallucinations come from, or can be even considered one at all. Due to this, one should stay vigilant if ever attacked by an entity. == Decay Anomaly == The Decay Anomaly is an anomaly that applies to every wanderer who steps inside of '''Level 381'''. It is a process that rots skin up to incredible speeds. This anomaly makes the level dangerous, and if possible, leave immediately. The anomaly has three stages, with the last stage being unsalvageable, even if one successfully leaves the level's premise. {| class="fandom-table" !Stage !Time Elapse !Description |- |Stage 1 |After entering |Nothing happens to the wanderer. |- |Stage 2.1 |4 hours |Wanderers may notice slight discomfort and pain in random patches of their skin. These patches appear to be gray and aged. |- |Stage 2.2 |10 hours |Some skin starts to fall off, and minor bleeding is possible. |- |Stage 3.1 |24 hours |All of one's skin looks gray and decayed, and severe pain and moderate bleeding is experienced by the wanderer. |- |Stage 3.2 |36 hours |Huge chunks of flesh will fall off the traveler's body, and an extremely unpleasant smell emanates from them. After they die, they will slowly be merged into the ground, leaving no marks of them at all. |} ==
Entities
== '''Level 381''' is devoid of entities. But as mentioned above, animal-like footprints and faint footsteps are reported by wanderers. Whether this is a hallucination made by the level remains a mystery. ==
Communities
== Due to the vile, decaying nature of '''Level 381''', and the prescence of Phenomenon 15, making a community in this level is currently infeasible. ==
Entrances and Exits
== == Entrances == * Being in [[Level 99]]'s The Grass Halls for a while will lead to this level. * Seeing greener hills in the distance and following it in [[Level 10]] leads here. == Exits == * Following a straight path for a extended amount of time will to [[Level 78]]. * Without warning, the level can seamlessly transport one to [[Level 55]]. * Random no-clipping can send one to [[Level List|a random level]]. {{Collapse|num=2|initial='''> Open Author & Licensing Information'''|final='''V Close Author & Licensing Information'''|body= '''Rewriter''': [[User:KenpiMRD|Goldscar]]
